scripts.vercel-build: VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build --workspace=client && node scripts/verify-vercel-build.mjs && node scripts/validate-client-bundle.mjs
scripts.build:production: npm ci && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.ci: npm ci && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build --workspace=client && node scripts/validate-client-bundle.mjs && npm test --workspace=server
scripts.ci:e2e: npm run seed:e2e && npm run test:e2e:qa && SKIP_E2E_WEBSERVER=1 npm run test:e2e
